sqlMap.select: select SCHEMA_NAME from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.SCHEMATA where SCHEMA_NAME = #dbname#
SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS WHERE table_name=#table_name# and constraint_type='FOREIGN KEY'
SELECT trigger_name, event_manipulation, action_statement, action_timing FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TRIGGERS WHERE trigger_schema=#trigger_schema#

SELECT KCU.COLUMN_NAME, KCU.REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME, TC.CONSTRAINT_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS AS TC INNER JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE AS KCU ON TC.TABLE_SCHEMA = KCU.TABLE_SCHEMA AND TC.TABLE_NAME = KCU.TABLE_NAME AND TC.CONSTRAINT_NAME = KCU.CONSTRAINT_NAME WHERE TC.CONSTRAINT_TYPE = #key_type# AND TC.TABLE_NAME = #table_name# ORDER BY KCU.ORDINAL_POSITION
SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES where table_schema= #table_schema# and table_name=#table_name#
select column_name name, data_type type, column_type, numeric_precision, numeric_scale, extra autoval, is_nullable, column_key from INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS where table_name=#table_name#

SELECT KCU.COLUMN_NAME, KCU.REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME, TC.CONSTRAINT_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS AS TC INNER JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE AS KCU ON TC.TABLE_SCHEMA = KCU.TABLE_SCHEMA AND TC.TABLE_NAME = KCU.TABLE_NAME AND TC.CONSTRAINT_NAME = KCU.CONSTRAINT_NAME WHERE TC.CONSTRAINT_TYPE = 'FOREIGN KEY' AND TC.TABLE_NAME = #table_name# ORDER BY KCU.ORDINAL_POSITION
select a.[name], a.cdefault, b.[text] from syscolumns as a left join syscomments as b on b.[id] = a.[cdefault] where a.[name] = #name#

SELECT KCU.COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS AS TC INNER JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE AS KCU ON TC.TABLE_SCHEMA = KCU.TABLE_SCHEMA AND TC.TABLE_NAME = KCU.TABLE_NAME AND TC.CONSTRAINT_NAME = KCU.CONSTRAINT_NAME WHERE TC.CONSTRAINT_TYPE = 'PRIMARY KEY' AND TC.TABLE_NAME = #table_name# ORDER BY KCU.ORDINAL_POSITION

SELECT KCU.COLUMN_NAME, KCU.REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME, TC.CONSTRAINT_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS AS TC INNER JOIN INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE AS KCU ON TC.TABLE_SCHEMA = KCU.TABLE_SCHEMA AND TC.TABLE_NAME = KCU.TABLE_NAME AND TC.CONSTRAINT_NAME = KCU.CONSTRAINT_NAME WHERE TC.CONSTRAINT_TYPE = 'FOREIGN KEY' AND TC.TABLE_NAME = #table_name# ORDER BY KCU.ORDINAL_POSITION
